title: Starshipwright
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''starshipwright''', also known as a '''shipwright''' for short or '''shipbuilder''',<ref name="SFS">''[[Strike Force: Shantipole]]''</ref> was any being skilled in the craft of building and maintaining [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. The [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] were known as master shipwrights.

The [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] were considered to be natural shipbuilders due to their innate love and knowledge of technology.<ref name="SFS" />

{{Stub}}
